% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for sinr_threshold_sweep
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.58\postprocessfigurewidth,
    title={SINR threshold sweep},
    xlabel={SINR threshold [dB]},
    ylabel={Fraction of user snapshots below threshold},
    grid=major,
    legend pos=south east,
    ymin=0.00000000,
    ymax=1.00000000,
  ]
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=CentralMassiveMimoColor] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Central massive MIMO}
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedFixedColor] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed fixed}
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
